title: SquareFi Launches Stablecoin Infrastructure for Cross-Border B2B Payments
message_html: SquareFi Launches Stablecoin Infrastructure for Cross-Border B2B Payments ...
snippet: Squarefi emerged from stealth Tuesday (March 10) and announced its stablecoin-based financial infrastructure for global business payments. This infrastructure is currently serving FinTechs and global platforms, and it has reached $250 million in transaction volume, the company said in a Tuesday pres

title: BitGo to custody digital assets for StableX's $100M stablecoin plan
message_html: BitGo to custody digital assets for StableX's $100M stablecoin plan ...
snippet: The collaboration will provide custody and trading infrastructure as StableX builds a $100 million digital asset treasury focused on stablecoins.
